item.title: Version 0.1.234
item.description: Recovery release. Adds Stop sharing entirely button (Settings ▸ Sync) to programmatically delete a stuck CKShare via CKDatabase.deleteRecord — bypasses Apple's flaky system Sharing UI. Fixes Copy invite link returning a URL before the readWrite publicPermission persisted to the server (cause of 'owner stopped sharing' errors on freshly-minted links). Adds Sparkle 2.x sandbox mach-lookup entitlements so the auto-updater installer can actually launch (cause of 'An error occurred while launching the installer' on previous updates).

item.title: Version 0.1.233
item.description: Fixes Copy invite link hang ('Swift task continuation misuse' — persistUpdatedShare's completion sometimes never fires when there's nothing to persist; we now short-circuit when the share already has a URL and use a 10s timeout + one-shot guard when an actual persist is needed). Also: Fireshot filename matching in bulk import.

item.title: Version 0.1.232
item.description: CRITICAL FIX: restores CloudKit sync after v0.1.229. The CODE_SIGN_INJECT_BASE_ENTITLEMENTS=NO setting (added for notarization to strip get-task-allow) also stripped application-identifier + team-identifier, which CKContainer requires. Symptom on /Applications install was 'Trying to initialize a container without an application ID' + no syncing to/from teammates. Also: Fireshot screenshot filenames now matched in bulk import; Email Proposal subject lines hoisted to position-0 + parser fallback; Gmail signature social icons use cached-URL fallback chain.

item.title: Version 0.1.231
item.description: Fixes launch crash on /Applications install — adds Mac framework rpath so dyld finds embedded Sparkle.framework. v0.1.229 + v0.1.230 had the rpath missing and would crash with 'Library not loaded: @rpath/Sparkle.framework' on any non-DerivedData launch.

channel.title: AM Creative CRM
channel.description: Sparkle update feed for AM Creative CRM.

item.title: Version 0.1.230
item.description: Fixes Gmail signature social icons (was missing the cached-URL fallback chain) and Email Proposal Subject line consistency (hoisted to position-0 of the addendum + parser fallback synthesizes one from the body when the model slips).

item.title: Version 0.1.229
item.description: First Sparkle build — auto-update + notarization, no more Gatekeeper prompts
